chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-6402 of 2022 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ Priority. 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No.27144/2022. 3. For hearing of main case. 05.08.2025 Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG. ------------- This is an old case of 2022, which is over three years old. In the morning learned counsel for the petitioners was present. We informed learned counsel for the petitioners to remain in the Court as this matter would be taken up on second call. On second call, learned counsel for the petitioners is called absent without intimation in this old matter. It appears that the petitioners have no serious interest in pursuing this petition otherwise he would remain in Court to argue this case, however, he has preferred to leave the Court and not even that anyone to intimate this Court about his whereabouts. Accordingly, this old petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
